chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 177 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.1685/2024 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 22.04.2024 None present for the applicant. No intimation is received. Same was the position on last date of hearing. Therefore, this criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
